n: Instance: The Day the Giant Came

steps.t: You have come outside of your home in town to find the snow worse than any weather you have seen in this part of Rohan.
You have come outside of your home in town to find the snow worse than any weather you have seen in this part of Rohan.
The rumbling came from north-west of town. You should search for the source of the rumbling.
Ludeca is in Dunfast. You should speak with Ludeca.
Something evil bears down on Dunfast. You should ensure that everyone has evacuated their homes.
Forthere's house is on the outskirts of Dunfast. You should break into Forthere's house.
Forthere is in his home in Dunfast. You should convince Forthere to evacuate immediately.
